description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the node:10.13.0 Docker image, caching the node_modules directory, and running npm install in before_script. Define a single deploy stage with a pages job that executes CI=true npm run build, then removes any existing public folder and moves the generated build directory to public. The job publishes the public/ directory as a Pages artifact and is limited to the master branch. Include the cache paths and artifact settings as shown.
